name: Tyson Foods, Inc.
description: Tyson Foods, Inc. is a global food company and one of the world's largest producers of beef, poultry, and pork. Headquartered in Springdale, Arkansas, the company manages a diverse portfolio of protein-centric brands, including Tyson, Jimmy Dean, Hillshire Farm, and Ball Park. Tyson Foods is dedicated to feeding the world by reimagining the journey from farm to table, focusing on innovation, food quality, and sustainability to provide nutritious and convenient protein options that meet the evolving needs of consumers in grocery stores, restaurants, and food service channels worldwide.
